programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga's Show/Flood: Helga does a standup routine at a school function and proceeds to insult all of her friends. They are offended, prompting her to change her act to a more friendly and gentle routine. She performs the new act, but it's boring.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga perform a \"Romeo and Juliet\"- type play for a school production

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: At the Parent's Day competition, Arnold learns that even though he doesn't have \"real\" parents, his grandparents are just as good as everyone else's parents.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Eugene's Birthday/Stinky's Pumpkin
programme.desc: Eugene's Birthday: Arnold is the cause of two birthday party's for Eugene being a big flop. Stinky's Pumpkin: Stinky feels that he is a failure at everything he does until Arnold helps him discover that he is the best pumpkin grower in town.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Dinner for Four/Phoebe Skips
programme.desc: Dinner for Four: After winning coupons to a fancy French restaurant, Helga attempts to prove to Arnold that she is more sophisticated than Lila. Phoebe Skips: Helga is devastated when her patsy, Phoebe, is skipped to the 6th grade.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Full Moon/Student Teacher
programme.desc: Full moon: When the gang all decide that they are going to "moon" Principal Wartz, Arnold thinks that it's a bad idea, but ends up inadvertently getting caught and taking the blame. Student Teacher: Olga comes to PS 118 to be a student teacher.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Big Gino/Jamie O in Luv
programme.desc: Big Gino: Sid gets in over his head when doing business with the local kid loan shark, Big Gino. Jamie O in Luv: Gerald's big brother, Jamie O, falls for a girl and suddenly turns nice to his kid brother.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Beeper Queen/Oscar Can't Read?
programme.desc: Beeper Queen: Big Bob pulls his back and cannot go to a very important meeting. Not knowing who else to send in his place, he asks Helga. Oscar Can't Read?: When Arnold discovers that Oskar has been pretending to know how to read, Arnold confronts him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: The Headless Cabbie/Friday the 13th
programme.desc: The Headless Cabbie: Wolfgang dares Arnold and the gang to break superstitions, which causes a spate of bad luck to erupt. Friday the 13th: At a sleepover, Arnold and the boys sit around and tell scary stories.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Parrot/Chocolate Turtles
programme.desc: Helga's Parrot: Big Bob gets a pesky parrot he passes to Helga, who confides in it about Arnold. Chocolate Turtles: Arnold and Gerald sell chocolate turtles to fund their go-cart project.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Love and Cheese/Weighing Harold
programme.desc: Love and Cheese: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Weighing Harold: Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold
programme.desc: It Girl: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. Deconstructing Arnold: The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him all together.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grudge Match/Polishing Rhonda
programme.desc: Grudge Match: Arnold and Grandpa vs Helga and Big Bob in a fender bender blame game. Polishing Rhonda: Rhonda and Patty's rivalry heats up at finishing school.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Back to School/Egg Story
programme.desc: Back To School: Grandpa returns to grade school so he can finally fulfill his dream of graduating. Egg Story: Mr. Simmons gives the class an assignment to couple up and take care of an egg over the weekend to learn teamwork and responsibility.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Weird Cousin/Baby Oskar
programme.desc: Weird Cousin: Arnold's weird cousin, Arnie, arrives for a visit and appears to be the biggest loser to everyone except Lila, the love of Arnold's life. Baby Oskar: Oskar's wife Susie agrees to watch her cousin's baby, also named Oskar.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga Sleepwalks/Fighting Families
programme.desc: Helga Sleepwalks: Helga begins to sleepwalk and ends up walking to Arnold's house. Fighting Families: The Fighting Families Contest has come to town and have selected two families: one from PS 118 and PS 119.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Monkeyman!/Buses, Bikes, Subways
programme.desc: Monkeyman!: Arnold is saved from thugs by a mysterious, caped character named Monkeyman. Buses, Bikes, Subways: Out on a field trip, Harold and Helga miss the bus and get separated from the rest of the class.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grandpa's Sister/Synchronized Swimming
programme.desc: Grandpa's sister: Mitzi arrives unexpectedly at the boarding house. Synchronized Swimming: Coach Wittenberg recruits Arnold's gang for a synchronized swim team.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Masquerade/Mr. Green Runs
programme.desc: Helga's Masquerade: When Helga realizes that Arnold is so taken by Lila because of her wit and charm, she decides that the only way to get Arnold to notice her is to be like Lila. Mr. Green Runs: Arnold helps Mr. Green run for the City Council.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga On The Couch
programme.desc: Helga is recommended for counseling after Mr. Simmons observes her berating Arnold, arguing with her parents, etc. She learns that unrequited love is very normal and that she's actually okay.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Dino Checks Out
programme.desc: Washed up balladeer Dino Spumoni fakes his own death in order to increase his record sales. Everyone believes he's dead and at the funeral, Grandpa and Arnold find out that Dino has left Arnold all his future record sales.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Summer Love
programme.desc: By complete coincidence, Arnold and Helga and family end up at the same beach resort for summer vacation. Helga is ecstatic until Arnold meets Summer, the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: After a chilling vampire movie, Sid is so spooked that he believes that Stinky has all of the characteristics of a vampire. Olga comes home and wants to be a big sister to a little girl.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Gerald becomes addicted to a game called "The King." When Arnold notices that Gerald is avoiding him and making excuses regarding his whereabouts, he becomes suspicious. Arnold, Sid, Gerald, and Harold go on a fishing trip.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: The guys find a bag of money and they want to split it up right away. But Arnold strongly suggests the honest route "to turn the money into the police and keep it if no one claims it."

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: When a new bully comes on the block, Wolfgang feels threatened that he will lose his power over Arnold and the gang. Phoebe breaks her leg when she rescues Helga from the pathway of a speeding bus.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold tries to help Eugene get out of a tree but gets stuck himself. After a busy day at school of boasting and fashion policing, Rhonda comes home and finds out that they are now broke and have nothing left.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga loses her infamous locket and it winds up in the wrong place in Arnold's house. Sid learns that germs are on just about everything people touch and becomes so psychotic about hygiene that he wears a protective suit.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los adolescentes que fueron reportados como desaparecidos son sospechosos de una serie de asesinatos en masa en Chicago, el UAC investiga su paradero para encontrar el motivo de los crímenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran esqueletos en el patio trasero de una casa de Virginia, la UAC enfoca su investigación en la familia que vive allí, desenterrando secretos familiares arraigados en las pasadas divisiones raciales en el Sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs continúa trabajando con el Capitan Wescott mientras él revisa sus propios rastros para ayudar al equipo atrapar a un importante terrorista.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de NCIS investiga el secuestro de una adolescente, Ziva y Abby trabajan en conjunto con una joven amiga, que fue testigo del secuestro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se une al Agente Fornell del FBI para investigar su intento de asesinato. Pero terminan enfrentando una situación inesperada cuando la ex esposa de ambos se involucra.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Es Navidad y Tony DiNozzo no sabe si ser desagradable o bueno cuando su papa, Anthony DiNozzo padre llega de visita.

programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated man suspected of domestic abuse refuses to obey deputies' orders, police find drugs in a woman's car, and an alleged prostitute encounters the police.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate the stabbing of a couple found at a local motel that is reminiscent of two incidents that occurred in the same room.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A spa weekend for Sara, Finlay and Morgan turns into a murder investigation and missing persons case when Finlay disappears, as the CSI team must piece together what happened in detail to find her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a man is found murdered at an elaborate holiday party complete with real snow and live reindeer, the CSI team is brought in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A petty crime aboard an inbound plane to Vegas becomes a murder investigation when one of the passengers is found dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to investigate a car crash and are shocked to discover the victim is someone they know.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team works two separate investigations, one involving a woman found murdered in Mexico and another of a local couple found dead in their driveway, they find that the evidence in one case may help the other.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nick and Greg investigate the death of a 16-year-old girl with ties to a brothel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murders of an Elvis impersonator and a bird that are strangely connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a rock and roll groupie and the disappearance of a prostitute who both have ties to a mysterious band.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to investigate when an entire family is reported to have been missing for a month.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell is taken hostage after a teenager opens fire in a police station.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs track a cannibalistic killer and discover he's not alone.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the cyber-related murder of a prominent casino owner's wife and receive help from the FBI's Cyber Crime Division.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a present-day crime with ties to a mob heist that occurred 25 years ago. Meanwhile, Brass has a decision to make when his daughter attempts suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI echa una mano a la policía local con varios arrestos hasta que se encuentra a un desconocido muerto en un automóvil. Además, las cosas se vuelven personales para el Capitán Brass cuando descubre algunos datos sobre su hija.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En un accidente aéreo muy cercano a la franja de Las Vegas mueren cinco personas y el equipo de CSI acude para investigar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una destacada presentadora de noticias durante una transmisión en vivo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe resolver el caso que involucra a una estrella del tenis en ascenso. Los CSI se quedan sorprendidos al escuchar que Hodges está comprometido con una belleza italiana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el CSI de Nueva York, Mac Taylor, decide sorprender a su novia en Las Vegas, descubre que ella está desaparecida y le pide a su amigo D.B. Russell su ayuda. Estrella invitada Gary Sinise de CSI:NY.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de la hermana de un famoso cantante cubano que se encuentra en la ciudad como parte de una gira por Estados Unidos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara es la principal sospechosa en una investigación después de un breve encuentro con un hombre y ella fue la última persona en verlo con vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando varios jugadores prominentes de póquer pierden la vida, se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar antes de que surjan más víctimas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo se une a David Phillips en su reunión de la escuela secundaria cuando descubre que la reina del baile ha sido asesinada.

programme.desc: Protagonizada por Yul Brynner y con un reparto estelar que incluye a Robert Fuller, Warren Oates y Claude Akins, este western de aventuras sigue a los siete magníficos hasta México, donde se enfrentarán al duelo de sus vidas.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: El desafío de los siete magníficos
programme.desc: El jefe de 'Los Siete Magníficos' es ahora el sheriff de una pequeña ciudad. Cuando su 'tranquilidad' es destruida por el asesinato de su esposa, acepta una misión: rescatar a un grupo de mujeres de unos bandidos con la ayuda de cinco duros convictos.

programme.title: Duelo en Diablo
programme.desc: El explorador Jess Remsberg dirige una caravana a través de territorio hostil hasta Fort Conchos, pero en su valor se oculta un motivo: saldar cuentas con el hombre que cree que mató a su esposa. Protagonizada por James Garner y Sidney Poitier.

programme.title: La marca de Satanás
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato conmociona a los habitantes de un pequeño pueblo rural; pero las cosas apenas comienzan cuando varias fuerzas malignas comienzan a plagar la ciudad.

programme.title: Pancho López
programme.desc: Un hombre es enviado a vender el ganado de un tío, pierde todo el dinero en el juego e inventa que fue asaltado.

programme.title: Sin Rastro
programme.desc: Un hombre busca a su esposa desaparecida luego de que se rompe su coche en una ruta desierta.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)
programme.desc: For three US Border Patrol agents, the contents of one car reveals a dark secret within their unit that could cost them all their lives. SXSW Grand Jury Award Winner 2016

programme.title: Justicia verdadera
programme.desc: Elijah Kane recibe presión del Jefe Graves para poner fin a una red de narcotraficantes rusos, mientras que la Policía novata Sarah demuestra su valor en las calles.

programme.title: Sueños de un asesino
programme.desc: La vida pacífica de la familia de Claire Cooper (Annette Bening) sufre un cambio terrorífico cuando un asesino serial (Robert Downey Jr.) invade su pueblo de Nueva Inglaterra... y acosa sus sueños con pistas de sus próximos movimientos mortales.

programme.title: Jugadores
programme.desc: Los ganadores del Óscar, Matt Damon y Edward Norton, protagonizan Rounders. Un exadicto a las apuestas regresa a las mesas en una apuesta de vida o muerte para rescatar a su amigo.

programme.title: Bordertown
programme.desc: Jennifer Lopez portrays a tenacious American reporter investigating the murders of young women working in a Mexican bordertown.

programme.title: El apartamento
programme.desc: ¿Y si la mujer que amabas desapareciera sin una sola palabra? ¿Hasta qué punto volverías a encontrarla? Josh Hartnett, Diane Kruger, Rose Byrne y Matthew Lillard protagonizan este intenso neonoir donde el amor se convierte en obsesivo.

programme.title: Una vida sin terminar
programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) vive en una hacienda de Wyoming con su único amigo, Mitch (Morgan Freeman), cuando la mujer a la que culpa por la muerte de su único hijo llega a su puerta sin dinero, desesperada y con una nieta a la que no conocía.

programme.title: Babel (ESP)
programme.desc: Del aclamado director Alejandro González Iñárritu (Amores Perros, 21 Gramos) llega el tercer filme de su trilogía, Babel, una película aplaudida por la crítica y de una gran emotividad sobre las barreras que separan a la humanidad.

programme.title: Mississippi en llamas
programme.desc: Dos agentes del FBI de aspecto muy diferente llegan a Mississippi para investigar la desaparición de algunos defensores de los derechos civiles.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Corazón valiente, la detallada y feroz saga de combate, amor tierno y la voluntad de arriesgarlo todo por la libertad. Película de Mel Gibson, ganadora del Premio de la Academia®. En una actuación cargada de emociones.

programme.title: Apocalypto (ESP)
programme.desc: Cuando el reino maya está al borde del colapso, un joven se embarca en un peligroso viaje hacia un mundo dominado por el miedo y la opresión.

programme.title: Survivor (2015)
programme.desc: Incriminada por crímenes que no cometió, una diplomática (Milla Jovovich, El quinto elemento) trata de impedir un ataque terrorista en Nueva York. Con Pierce Brosnan y Dylan McDermott.

programme.title: Freeway
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: Dos duros sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Mickey Rourke y Don Johnson protagonizan esta colisión de géneros de cuatro caminos: película de moteros, thriller de atracos, película de amigos y película de ciencia ficción, que te hará sentir una aventura y acción trepidantes.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: Un mafioso atrapa a dos ladrones de autos mientras le roban y les da una semana para conseguirle un Ferrari clásico. Si no, podrían perderlo todo.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Todos los perros van al cielo: Un cuento de navidad
programme.desc: Tres perros defenderán con uñas y dientes las Navidades, en un esfuerzo por salvarlas de un espíritu malvado (Carface) que quiere utilizar perros de todo el mundo para arruinar la Navidad.

programme.title: Milagro de navidad
programme.desc: La joven Jessica encuentra un reno herido en el bosque nevado. Creyendo que es el verdadero Prancer, promete curarlo para devolvérselo a Papá Noel, y su empeño cambiará mágicamente la vida de toda la gente a su alrededor.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: El ilusionista
programme.desc: En este drama nominado al Óscar ambientado en la Viena de principios de 1900, el ilusionista Eisenheim (Edward Norton, Historia americana X) usa sus poderes para encantar a una aristócrata comprometida.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Cocodrilo Dundee regresa en otro divertido episodio de la querida saga de películas. Después de que la novia de Mick, Sue, haya sido asignada a la oficina de L.A. del periódico de su padre, Mick, Sue y su hijo Mickey, se van a Hollywood.

programme.title: Escuela de rock
programme.desc: Jack Black interpreta a un guitarrista con delirios de grandeza. Cuando lo echan de la banda, y se pone a buscar trabajo, se convierte en un maestro suplente y hace de su clase una banda de rock and roll.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su TV, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que les muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son le mejor!

programme.title: El dictador
programme.desc: Los creadores y las estrellas de Borat traen esta asombrosa comedia sobre lo que pasa cuando el peor dictador del mundo llega a los Estados Unidos ¡Prepárate para llorar de risa con esta comedia delirante y bochornosamente divertida!

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: El dictador
programme.desc: Los creadores y las estrellas de Borat traen esta asombrosa comedia sobre lo que pasa cuando el peor dictador del mundo llega a los Estados Unidos ¡Prepárate para llorar de risa con esta comedia delirante y bochornosamente divertida!

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: La vida útil
programme.desc: Un empleado de cine se ajusta a su nueva vida después de que el cine en el que trabajó por más de 25 años se ve obligado a cerrar. Subtitulada.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Mama para rato
programme.desc: En el Día Sagrado de las Muertes, una madre regresa y descubre que sus tres hijos son desconsiderados, feos y vagos.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una Niñera Para Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer de carrera cuida a los hijos de un ejecutivo de publicidad de Beverly Hills durante las vacaciones navideñas.

programme.title: Cercano a la Navidad
programme.desc: La organizadora Hayley planea una Navidad tranquila en la montaña, pero la presencia del entrometido Paul enciende chispas inesperadas y un nuevo romance.

programme.title: Juntos en Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer se enamora mientras alquila la casa de huéspedes de un joven padre en Navidad.

programme.title: Pueblo Navideño
programme.desc: Una adicta al trabajo sospecha de la partida repentina de su padre para mudarse a un pequeño pueblo en Navidad.

programme.title: Una Niñera Para Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer de carrera cuida a los hijos de un ejecutivo de publicidad de Beverly Hills durante las vacaciones navideñas.

programme.title: Cercano a la Navidad
programme.desc: La organizadora Hayley planea una Navidad tranquila en la montaña, pero la presencia del entrometido Paul enciende chispas inesperadas y un nuevo romance.

programme.title: Juntos en Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer se enamora mientras alquila la casa de huéspedes de un joven padre en Navidad.

programme.title: Los 12 perros de Navidad
programme.desc: Un padre viudo y desempleado envía a regañadientes a su hija a permanecer con su tía en una ciudad que ha prohibido los perros. En el camino a la escuela un día encuentra un perrito y decide quedárselo.

programme.title: Viernes 13 parte VI: Jason vive
programme.desc: De niño, Tommy Jarvis hizo algo que muchos murieron intentando hacer: mató a Jason Vorhees, el asesino que aterrorizó a Crystal Lake. Ahora, años después, Tommy está atormentado por el temor de que Jason siga vivo.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VII: la nueva sangre
programme.desc: Desde que el maníaco homicida Jason Voorhees quedó atrapado en cadenas en el fondo de Crystal Lake, el campamento de verano cercano ha funcionado sin problemas ... sin asesinato.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VIII: Jason invade Manhattan
programme.desc: La Gran Manzana está en grandes problemas, ya que el indestructible psicópata Jason Voorhees sale a la ciudad de Nueva York y pinta la ciudad de "rojo".

programme.title: Día de la madre
programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay brinda una interpretación aterradora en este baño de sangre brutal. Cuando sus hijos entran a una casa y toman como rehenes a los dueños; ella les enseña cómo es la verdadera tortura. Coprotagonizada por Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: El Perfume: Historia de un asesino
programme.desc: En Francia, en el siglo 18, vivió Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, que nació con un gran sentido del olfato. Pero cuando su don se transforma en obsesión, lucha por crear el perfume más excitante del mundo matando jovencitas para capturar su esencia.

programme.title: Sueños de un asesino
programme.desc: La vida pacífica de la familia de Claire Cooper (Annette Bening) sufre un cambio terrorífico cuando un asesino serial (Robert Downey Jr.) invade su pueblo de Nueva Inglaterra... y acosa sus sueños con pistas de sus próximos movimientos mortales.

programme.title: Last Train From Gun Hill
programme.desc: Screen giants Kirk Douglas and Anthony Quinn star in this taut Western thriller directed by acclaimed filmmaker John Sturges (Gunfight at the O.K. Corral, The Great Escape).

programme.title: The Strawberry Roan
programme.desc: Gene’s first color film stars Champion in the title role as a wild outlaw stallion, branded a killer, and the two-fisted cowboy who fights off a gun-crazed posse to win justice for the noble animal.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman (2014)
programme.desc: Quirt Evans, an all round bad guy, is nursed back to health and sought after by Penelope Worth, a Quaker girl. He eventually finds himself having to choose between his world and the world Penelope lives in.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Texas Rangers and long-time ranching partners Gus McCrae and Woodrow Call meet their old friend Jake, and decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations. Sheriff July Johnson heads to Texas, and former prostitute Lorena is abandoned by Jake and kidnapped by the psychotic Blue Duck.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Gus and July save Lorena from Blue Duck, but at a deadly cost. Jake runs with a bad crowd and pays the price. July accepts that his wife has left him and stays on at Clara's with his newborn son.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: The cattle drive reaches Nebraska, where Gus and Clara reunite. Drought and Indian attacks take their toll as the drive reaches Montana, and Gus is wounded. Call honors his best friend's request.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him.

programme.title: The Night of the Hunter
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum stars in an unforgettable role as a psychopathic preacher in the relentless pursuit of two children who have their dead father's stolen fortune hidden in a doll. Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: A millionaire offers $10,000 to five people who agree to be locked in a large, spooky, rented house overnight with him and his wife.

programme.title: Come Blow Your Horn
programme.desc: A free-swinging playboy introduces his hero-worshipping younger brother to the delights of high living in this adaption of Neil Simon's Broadway comedy about a Jewish family in New York City.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution (1958)
programme.desc: Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich and Charles Laughton star in this exceptional courtroom Drama about a young man on trial for a wealthy widow's murder after he suspiciously profits from her will.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa visits Oliver's mother who is recovering from an illness. The doctor advises that she rest in a peaceful environment...and thinks that Hooterville sounds absolutely ideal! Of course, he doesn't know Hooterville, where peace is never…very close.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Henry Fonda makes a rare television guest appearance when Maude decides he is an ideal candidate for President of the United States and starts the campaign without him, in the first half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude persists in spearheading a movement to draft Henry Fonda for President and has everyone around her convinced that she must be a manic-depressive in need of professional care.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude uses her position as director of Tuckahoe's Bicentennial musical extravaganza to create a tribute to American women -- a theme that hardly thrills Walter, Arthur, and the colonel in charge of the armory where the show is to be staged.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck is ready to become an American citizen -- but her test turns from mental to physical when she learns she has a serious illness. The Findlay's frustration over her forgetfulness changes to concern when she is admitted to the hospital.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's unfailing loyalty to her nephew Steve stretches very thin, and so does Walter's patience, when it becomes evident that his 'free and easy' lifestyle is just a cover-up for his basic lack of responsibility.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude refuses to accept the idea that a noted literary authority would choose to lunch with Vivian at the exclusion of herself. But, when she confronts the two of them, the reality of the situation becomes painfully clear.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Carol discovers she's got to show her boss more than just proficiency if she wants a promotion -- and Maude, upset, tries to save Carol from sacrificing herself.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude has nothing but good intentions when she hires an ex-convict, but panics after she finds out why he went to prison.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix's new romantic interest is not the librarian he thinks she is.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Oscar's young niece, Martha, arrives at the apartment in an advanced state of pregnancy and tells her uncle she has run away from home because her parents object to her decision.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix selects a grave site and entrusts Oscar with the money for a down payment.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Oscar becomes a somnambulist and vents his frustrations against Felix.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Film makers are in town to do a documentary on Robbie's physics class. Bub tell Robbie he should try to get a part in the film. Robbie and another student are chosen for a close up shot, showing what they are doing in physics.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip needs a drawing for open house at school and finds the family circle a pretty rough bunch of critics. He decides a sailboat picture of Bub's beats his own efforts, and he borrows it.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve returns from a business trip by train, and the rest of the family go to the station to meet him. As they prepare to go home, they realize Tramp is no longer with them.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie (Don Grady) might not be able to play in his school's football game unless he can improve his grades in math. Also, Chip (Stanley Livingston) has a cold and later catches the measles.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When Freddie Helper connects the freckles on Rob's back with a marker, an interesting picture appears.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Petries wonder if they're being duped when former maid Maria sends her matador boyfriend to work for them.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When Ritchie tells his friends about human reproduction, his parents wind up in the psychologist's office.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recalls the time he defended his title as middleweight champion of the Army camp.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate decides to contest a jaywalking ticket she receives in Pixley.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe's entry into the beekeeping business disrupts newlyweds Steve and Betty JO Elliott.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Rose Murphy is sexually assaulted at work by her boss and, fending off another attack, she kills him. When she confesses the shooting to her husband, he makes it look like a failed robbery. A pair of thieves are arrested, but the clues don’t add up.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Morphine tablets have been disappearing from Newton General Hospital, and Tibbs' investigation into the suspicious deaths of terminally ill patients at that facility leads him to believe his Aunt Ruda's own physician, Dr. Lambert, might be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba learns the disappointing truth that Eddie Larran, the country singer he idolizes, might have stolen his biggest hit, leaving his former writing partner, Ace McCabe, with none of the wealth derived from the song. Robert Goulet guest stars.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Serena Grimes, the victim of a violent armed robbery, becomes obsessed with Bubba Skinner when she misinterprets his kindness for romance. Soon, flowers arrive at the station for Bubba, amusing Gillespie and the staff, until the stalking begins.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When the drowned body of Rebecca Lewis is found washed up on a riverbank, her friend and Tibbs’ law school buddy, Mark Meyers is the prime suspect based on an eyewitness account. He’s arrested for murder, but Tibbs doesn’t think that Mark is guilty.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When a judge running for Congress refuses to grant his wife a divorce, she threatens to reveal a secret from his past that would ruin his chances for election. Then, she’s found dead as part of a failed robbery, and the judge claims he has an alibi.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Officer Wilson Sweet is accused of allegedly soliciting a bribe when he arrests Bob Pinkney, a shady car salesman, and his buddy Al Merck after they drunkenly crash an event honoring D.A. Gerard Darnelle and cause a disturbance when asked to leave.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Parker’s stepfather, Roy Eversole, is not a perfect man; he drinks too much, fights too much, and now he’s suspected of murdering his ex-boss, Norbert Clemmons, after losing his job. Parker can’t believe it, and neither can Gillespie. So who did it?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A nasty slumlord threatening to evict a single mother and her daughter is later suspected of murder, but Gillespie’s hands are tied as this is Sheriff McComb’s case. Meanwhile, Parker has a new speed gun and he’s become the most hated man in Sparta.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The shooting of the campaign manager of a white supremacist politician appears to be a botched assassination attempt on the Senate candidate himself, but it soon reveals a web of deceit and betrayal. Was the assassination botched intentionally?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The shooting of Chris Pastore becomes a murder when, no longer able to hold on, he dies. Meanwhile, the question remains, was he the intended target? Gillespie and Tibbs continue their investigation into politician George Deschamps and his cronies.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When an embezzler, Jimmy Ray, returns to Sparta after many years away, it stirs up old resentments as he encounters the families that he stole from years ago, including Virgil Tibbs’ sweet-natured Aunt Etta, who turns to Chief Gillespie for help.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.desc: En este episodio, un asesinato de una década de una joven ama de casa de Texas es investigado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de 13 años desapareció de su casa en Colorado y la única evidencia que dejó el secuestrador fueron tres huellas digitales en la cortina de una ventana.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido apuñalada más de treinta veces y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. Cerca de su cabeza, la policía descubrió un distintivo botón con hebras de hilo todavía unidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una Bolsa de Evidencia
programme.desc: Se investiga el asesinato de Jessica Knott, de 9 años. Los investigadores usan una bolsa de basura para conectar al sospechoso James Edward Crow, Jr. con el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Gayle Isleib, de 54 años, fue emboscada en su camino de entrada de Manchester, Connecticut, y asesinada a tiros. Ahora la policía debe determinar si el amor se convirtió en obsesión... y en un motivo de asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ahogamiento seco
programme.desc: Cuando Genell Plude es encontrada muerta en su baño, la escena apunta a un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan, quien fue condenada por matar a su madre en el incendio de un carro, recibe un nuevo juicio. La opinión de un testigo experto en incendios sobre cómo se encendió el fuego difiere de la teoría de la fiscalía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los testigos vieron a una mujer en la parte trasera de un camión, agitando los brazos y gritando. Cuando encontraron una chaqueta cerca de un charco de sangre, supieron que lo que habían visto no había sido un paseo divertido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Cómo pudo el acosador obtener el código del sistema de seguridad del hogar de la víctima? ¿Cómo pudo robar sus fotografías personales? La policía necesitaba respuestas y las encontraron en el lugar más extraño.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía de Alaska encontró el cuerpo de una mujer mientras patrullaba de rutina un parque público.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Placas y mentiras
programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario fue encontrado muerto y la evidencia sugirió que conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Guest choreographers test the rookies with new routines, the veterans arrive at camp determined to earn back their spots, and country star Mickey Guyton has inspiring words for the hopefuls.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure's on for rookies and vets as the hopefuls head to the stadium for their first field rehearsal, and Kelli and Judy must decide which women won't move on in training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies outshine the veterans when choreographer Travis Wall teaches a sexy dance number, and Kelli and Judy give some of the vets a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers get a chance to showcase their unique talents during show group auditions, and Kelli and Judy deliberate with guest judges to select the elite squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers test their ability to think on their toes during a series of mock-press interviews, and as auditions wind down, a shocking bit of news shakes up the process for Kelli and Judy.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make cuts via video chat after a positive test for COVID-19 halts camp, Charlotte Jones hands out the iconic uniforms, and the team performs its game-day entrance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As 51 rookies and veterans arrive to chase their dreams, the candidates hope to prove their talent with a standout solo performance and take on the kick line in the Judges' Showcase.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: On their last day in Vegas, Pauly and Nikki must make a difficult decision about their relationship. Vinny and Maria consider their future together. And Derynn must decide if she will stay in Vegas for Pretty Ricky.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how earthquakes and faults have shaped human history by bringing both life and death.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how rocks have influenced the architecture of the Mediterranean, from the pyramids of Egypt to the squares of ancient Greece.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how ancient civilisations learned to exploit the water around them, from the flooding of our Stone Age ancestors' hunting grounds to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who
